Layer.ProfileCheckCommand:
%function(self)
if not GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) and GAMESTATE:PlayersCanJoin() then self:settext('PRESS START') elseif GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) and not PREFSMAN:GetPreference('MemoryCardProfiles') then if GAMESTATE:GetPlayerDisplayName(PLAYER_1) == 'Player 1' then self:settext( 'Loading...' ) else self:settext( GAMESTATE:GetPlayerDisplayName(PLAYER_1) ) end else self:settext(' ') end
self:sleep(1/60) self:queuecommand('ProfileCheck')
end

%function(self)
if not GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) and GAMESTATE:PlayersCanJoin() then self:settext('PRESS START') elseif GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) and not PREFSMAN:GetPreference('MemoryCardProfiles') then if GAMESTATE:GetPlayerDisplayName(PLAYER_2) == 'Player 2' then self:settext( 'Loading...' ) else self:settext( GAMESTATE:GetPlayerDisplayName(PLAYER_2) ) end else self:settext('NOT PRESENT') end
self:sleep(1/60) self:queuecommand('ProfileCheck')
end
